notes: Implemented startup retry handling for Worker.purge_messages while honoring broker_connection_retry_on_startup=False; added unit coverage for retry and disabled-retry paths.
tests_after_summary: Focused pytest passed: t/unit/worker/test_worker.py::test_Consumer::test_worker_purge_messages_uses_startup_retry and ::test_worker_purge_messages_honors_disabled_startup_retry (2 passed).
tests_before_summary: Preflight by source inspection: worker --purge used app.connection_for_write() directly and did not call ensure_connection, so broker_connection_retry_on_startup was bypassed before the worker consumer retry loop.

notes: Implemented an early task_consumer.cancel() before consumer.close() so warm shutdown stops fetching new messages before teardown proceeds; real SQS side effects were not used.
tests_after_summary: Focused pytest passed: t/unit/worker/test_worker.py::test_WorkController::test_signal_consumer_close_cancels_task_consumer_before_close (1 passed).
tests_before_summary: Preflight by source inspection: WorkController.signal_consumer_close only closed the consumer blueprint and did not cancel the task_consumer immediately when warm shutdown began.

notes: Wrapped new-style errback invocation in exception logging and continuation; added unit coverage proving a later errback still runs after an earlier errback raises.

tests_before_summary: Preflight by source inspection: _call_task_errbacks invoked new-style errbacks directly without catching non-NotRegistered exceptions, allowing one failure to stop subsequent errbacks.

notes: Patched Typer's Click 7 completion context resolver to invoke group callbacks while traversing subcommands, then added regression coverage for ctx.obj in subcommand autocompletion.

notes: Environment/non-repro skip: the report depends on invoking the app through the generic python command; the baseline's PowerShell script correctly targets the app command name and cannot safely register completions for all python invocations.
tests_after_summary: No changes made: repeated validation showed the pinned baseline completes values when invoked as the registered app command, while the reported `python main.py` PowerShell invocation cannot trigger an app-specific completer.
tests_before_summary: PYTHONPATH=. direct completion for the issue's option returned Camila, Carlos, and Sebastian; generated pwsh script registers -CommandName main.py and not python.
